Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert

package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert
This package provides core interfaces and utilities for object conversion and copying. Using codes similar to the following to convert object and copy object properties: 

 // convert object
 ObjectConverter converter = ObjectConverter.defaultConverter();
 converter.convert(src, target, options);
 // copy object properties
 ObjectCopier copier = ObjectCopier.defaultCopier();
 copier.copyProperties(src, dst, options);
The core interfaces in this package:
  • ObjectConverter
  • ObjectConverter.Handler
  • AssignableConvertHandler
  • CommonConvertHandler
  • ObjectCopier
  • ObjectCopier.Handler
  • CommonCopierHandler
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    space.sunqian.fs.object
    This package provides basic object related supports: ObjectKit: The utilities for objects; ObjectException: Base exception for object related errors; And its subpackages provide specific object related supports; space.sunqian.fs.object.schema: Defines schemas for data objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.builder: Defines steps for creating and building objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.convert: Converts and copies objects and properties; space.sunqian.fs.object.pool: Provides pool interfaces for objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation: Provides annotations for object related operations;
    space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.handlers
     
    space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation
    This package provides annotations for object related operations, such as conversion and copying.
    space.sunqian.fs.object.builder
    This package provides builder related operations, it definitions and utilities for creating and building objects.
    space.sunqian.fs.object.pool
    This package provides simple way to create simple object pools:
    space.sunqian.fs.object.schema
    This package provides definitions and utilities for schemas, including map schema and non-map object schema.
  • Class
    Description
    ConvertKit
    Utilities for object conversion.
    ConvertOption
    Option for object conversion and data mapping.
    ObjectConverter
    This interface is used to convert an object from the specified type to the target type.
    ObjectConverter.Handler
    Handler for ObjectConverter, provides the specific conversion logic.
    ObjectConverter.Status
    Represents the status of conversion.
    ObjectConvertException
    Exception for object conversion.
    ObjectCopier
    This interface is used to copy data properties from an object to another object.
    ObjectCopier.Handler
    Handler for ObjectCopier, provides the specific copy logic for copying each object property to the destination object.
    ObjectCopyException
    Exception for object copy operations.
    UnsupportedObjectConvertException
    This exception is thrown when an object conversion is unsupported.
